criteria.name: AI Capabilities
criteria.description: Extent and sophistication of AI features, including natural language processing, machine learning, and deep learning.

criteria.name: Functionality and Utility
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of functions provided, ability to streamline tasks, and overall value in enhancing productivity.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use, intuitiveness of interface, and overall user satisfaction.

criteria.name: Integration
criteria.description: Seamlessness of integration with other apps and platforms.

criteria.name: Customer Reviews
criteria.description: Sentiment and feedback from user reviews and ratings.
